title: Request normalization

commands.summary: Final S02 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, invoke Claude runtime review, write review queues, write review assignments, send review notifications, replace human approval, append audit ledgers, write audit events, write databases, write storage, or persist product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S02 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

An initial Claude CLI attempt was manually terminated after remaining at zero stdout/stderr bytes and produced no review output. It is recorded only as an invalid partial attempt and is not counted as the completed review evidence unit.

Claude C00 valid review completed once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude rated the S02 implementation GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Four P3 notes are informational and explicitly deferred: extra input-shape deny rows, strict extra-key rejection symmetry, direct normalizer-to-fixture deepEqual, and Matter pair validation deferred to S04.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed once before production_ready closeout; the earlier zero-output manual termination did not produce a valid review and is excluded from exactly_one_valid_review_run.
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by this deterministic synthetic request-normalization boundary because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, audit write, storage write, database write, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.request_normalization: S02 normalizes the S01 production_ready Claude review service entrypoint contract into a frozen claude_review request metadata object, carries S20 evidence refs, preserves model and read-only review semantics, keeps RP00.P02.M04 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S03.
